title: Kerberoasting: SPN Sweep - Multiple Service Tickets from Single Account
description: Detects a single account requesting service tickets for multiple distinct services in a short window, indicating SPN sweep for offline hash cracking. Rubeus kerberoast and Invoke-Kerberoast request tickets for all SPN-enabled accounts rapidly. Normal users request 1-3 service tickets; attackers request 10+.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = 4769))
falsepositives: Service accounts legitimately accessing many services
